lyrics.label: Verse 1

Tears are dropping down from their face
Some people laughing inside I know
But some people happy that I’m dead

Did my wrongs outweighs the right
Did my songs outlast the time
Only thing on my mind is I am coming home
I’ve run my race but wait
When my loved ones come to their last day
Do they know the answer to say
Do they know the answer’s a name

lyrics.label: Chorus
lines: I wish I said more about my Lord
I wish I told them about Jesus
But now my whole world start freezing
It’s the last chance that I pray
It’s the last prayer that I make

lyrics.label: Verse 2
lines: The last breath that I take
In Jesus name that I pray
I pray for the one who knows you
And I pray for the one who’s not saved
I pray for the one who loves me
And I pray for the poeple I love
I pray for the ones who have the world
And I pray for the one that don’t have enough
I pray for the one who’s in power
And I pray for those who needs support
I pray for the ones who are wealthy
And I pray for the ones who are poor
I pray for the family who lost their children or husband in the war
I pray that this generation will know death is not the ending there is more!

My music my gift my blessing my life
May your will be done but not mine

lines: There’s one thing I pray and nothing else
That the people I love don’t end up in hell
That they’ll realize ain’t no way they can save themselves
